svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="环境分层发布策略" id="envrouting"> <mxGraphModel dx="-609" dy="-181" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="环境分层发布策略 · 风险越高，人的决策权越靠前" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="700" x="200" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="AI 修复 PR · 三层验证全过" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="340" x="380" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane1" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;horizontal=1;swimlaneFillColor=#ffffff;" value="测试环境（test）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="940" x="80" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" parent="lane1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="✅ 自动合并
到 dev 分支" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="40" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="lane1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="✅ 自动部署
测试环境" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="260" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" parent="lane1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="自动跑冒烟 + E2E
（再验证一次）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="480" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4" parent="lane1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;fontStyle=2;" value="炸了无所谓
本就是用来试错的" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="720" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="te1" edge="1" parent="lane1" source="t1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="t2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="te2" edge="1" parent="lane1" source="t2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="t3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane2" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;horizontal=1;swimlaneFillColor=#ffffff;" value="预发布环境（staging）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="940" x="80" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s0" parent="lane2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="⚠️ 限定低风险类
（NPE/编译错等）
SQL/配置变更不自动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="lane2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="✅ 自动部署
staging" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="220" y="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="lane2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="自动跑回归
+ 性能基线比对" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="400" y="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="lane2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="✗ 失败立即自动回滚
飞书通知" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="610" y="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="lane2" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#2563eb;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ 通过 → 待生产确认" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="110" x="810" y="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se1" edge="1" parent="lane2" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se2" edge="1" parent="lane2" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="s3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane3" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;horizontal=1;swimlaneFillColor=#ffffff;" value="生产环境（prod）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="940" x="80" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p0" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="🔒 人工卡点
review PR
+ 合 main
+ 点发布确认" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="20" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="灰度 5%
（15 分钟）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="220" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="AIOps 自动比对
错误率 / P99 / 业务指标
vs 基线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="400" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="正常 → 自动放量 50%
再观察 15 分钟" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="170" x="620" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="持续正常
→ 自动全量" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="830" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p5" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="✗ 任一阶段异常 → AIOps 自动回滚到稳定版本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="430" x="220" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe1" edge="1" parent="lane3" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="p2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe2" edge="1" parent="lane3" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="p3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe3" edge="1" parent="lane3" source="p3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="p4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cross1" edge="1" parent="1" source="pr" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="lane1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cross2" edge="1" parent="1" source="lane1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;" target="lane2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cross3" edge="1" parent="1" source="lane2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=classic;fontSize=11;fontColor=#2563eb;fontStyle=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="lane3" value="🔒 人工确认"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="自动化程度" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="50" x="1040" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="全自动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1040" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="条件
自动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1040" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="人工
卡点" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="50" x="1040" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;fontStyle=2;" value="核心：非生产可全自动，生产发布必须人决策。AIOps 负责发布后的指标比对和放量/回滚决策——这是它比人更敏感的领域。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="900" x="100" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
